creator: drs-freebsd@sieborger.nom.za
text:
Created attachment 232466
Patch

The RTx::Calendar extension to RT supports RT 5.0 [1], but the port only supports RT 4.4.  This patch adds FLAVORs for rt44 and rt50, in much the same way as www/p5-RT-Extension-MandatoryOnTransition does.

[1] https://metacpan.org/pod/RTx::Calendar#RT-VERSION
